recalls.Description: Apollo America is recalling its Combination Smoke and Carbon Monoxide Detectors, model number 51000-600, due to a malfunction that may prevent alerts for fires or carbon monoxide leaks. These detectors, sold in white, feature a 'Replace by' date between June and October 2034. The model number and brand name are located on the back of the device. It's crucial to dispose of the lithium battery properly, as improper disposal can lead to fire hazards. Check with local hazardous waste facilities for safe disposal options.
recalls.Title: Apollo America Recalls Smoke and Carbon Monoxide Detectors Due to Alert Failure; Risk of Serious Injury or Death
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, contact Vivint at 800-281-9667, email recalls@vivint.com, or visit https://www.vivint.com/smoke-co-recall. Additional details can be found by clicking on 'Product Recall' at the bottom of the Vivint homepage.

Products.Name: Apollo America Combination Smoke and Carbon Monoxide Detector

Images.Caption: Recalled Apollo America Smoke and Carbon Monoxide Detector
Back of recalled Apollo America Smoke and Carbon Monoxide Detector
Recalled Apollo America Smoke and Carbon Monoxide Detector

Manufacturers.Name: Apollo America Inc., of Auburn Hills, Michigan

Retailers.Name: Available online at www.Vivint.com and through door-to-door and telephone sales by Vivint from June to October 2024, priced between $50 and $100.

Hazards.Name: Malfunctioning detectors that may fail to alert for fires or carbon monoxide leaks, leading to risks of smoke inhalation, poisoning, or death.

Remedies.Name: Vivint is providing free replacement detectors to all known customers. Users should continue to use the recalled units until the new ones arrive and should follow the provided installation guide upon receipt.

recalls.metaDescription: Apollo America recalls smoke and carbon monoxide detectors due to alert failures, posing serious risks. Contact Vivint for replacements.

recalls.Description: New Cosmos USA is recalling its DeNova Detect combination natural gas and carbon monoxide alarms, model DD622NCV. These alarms are marked with the DeNova Detect brand name on the front, while the model number can be found on the top side and the serial number is located on the right side of the device. The recall is due to a failure in the alarms to consistently alert users to the presence of natural gas or carbon monoxide, which can lead to serious health risks.
recalls.Title: New Cosmos USA Recalls DeNova Detect Natural Gas and Carbon Monoxide Alarms Due to Safety Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach New Cosmos USA Inc. at 888-447-6016 from 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email safety@DeNovaDetect.com, or visit www.denovadetect.com and click on "Recalls" or go directly to www.denovadetect.com/safetynotice-dd622.

Products.Name: DeNova Detect Combination Natural Gas and Carbon Monoxide Alarms

Images.Caption: Location of Model Number of Alarm
Location of Serial Number of Alarm

Retailers.Name: Available at Lowe's stores nationwide and online at Amazon.com, Lowes.com, and Denovadetect.com from December 2023 through July 2024, priced between $90 and $102.

Distributors.Name: New Cosmos USA Inc., of Lisle, Illinois

Hazards.Name: The alarm may enter sleep mode after a short alert, failing to detect new gas or carbon monoxide incidents, increasing the risk of poisoning.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should register online at www.denovadetect.com/safetynotice-dd622 to receive a prepaid shipping package and a replacement alarm. They should continue using the recalled alarms until the replacements are installed and return the recalled units using the provided shipping package.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall alert: DeNova Detect natural gas and carbon monoxide alarms may fail to alert users, posing serious safety risks. Learn more now.

recalls.Description: The CHZHVAN brand combination smoke and carbon monoxide detectors, model JKD-512, are being recalled due to a critical safety issue. These detectors, made of white plastic and approximately four inches in diameter, feature a black plastic circle with a digital display on the front. The model number and battery specifications are printed on the back, which accommodates three AAA batteries. Consumers should be aware that these devices may not activate in the event of a fire, posing a significant risk to safety.
recalls.Title: Recall of CHZHVAN Smoke and Carbon Monoxide Detectors Due to Fire Alert Failure
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, reach out to Haikouhuidishangmaoyouxiangongsi via email at l18276710356@163.com, or visit www.amazon.com/sp?ie=UTF8&seller=A4INNIJC6B92S&asin=B0C2ZCTCZ8&ref_=dp_merchant_link&isAmazonFulfilled=1 or www.haikouhuidi.com and click on 'Recalls' for further details.

Products.Name: CHZHVAN Combination Smoke and Carbon Monoxide Detectors

Images.Caption: Recalled CHZHVAN Combination Smoke and Carbon Monoxide Detector (Front with Packaging)
Recalled CHZHVAN Combination Smoke and Carbon Monoxide Detector (Back with Packaging)

Injuries.Name: There are five reports of the detectors failing to alarm in the presence of smoke. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com between August 2023 and January 2024, priced from $18 to $59.

Hazards.Name: Failure to activate, increasing the risk of undetected fire.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the detectors immediately and contact Haikouhuidishangmaoyouxiangongsi for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: CHZHVAN smoke and carbon monoxide detectors recalled due to fire alert failure. Contact for refunds.
